title: Optimized For NVIDIA
description: A modpack for any Nvidia PC. Customizable to your liking
body:
# Optimized For NVIDIA PCs

**Welcome to my first project!** This is a modpack that originally was made for my PC only but i saw that many people needed a good modpack that works well on NVIDIA GPU Computers. I also needed that but all the modpacks that I found either had a bunch of mods that weren't needed, or they didn't work good on NVIDIA GPU Computers, so I decided to do something about it. 
# Mods and Description
There are 13 mods in this modpacks, all chosen by their performance and optimization. You may customize it to your liking (and PC performance).  Everything is in default settings. *please keep in mind that Nvidium only works on computers with a Nvidia Graphics card. If using on a Non-Nvidia Computer, the mod will automatically disable itself not effecting gameplay*

 - **Collective** *by Serilum*
 - **Dynamic FPS** *by juliand665*
 - **Memory Leak Fix** *by FX* 
 - **Sodium** *by jellysquid3*
 - **Entity Culling** *by tr7zw*
 - **Nvidium** *by cortex*
 - **FerriteCore** by malte0811
 - **BadOptimizations** by thosea
 - **Sodium Extra** By FlashyReese

These are just the main plugins used for optimization. There are more and I will always be adding to the list of mods this modpack has, *chosen for optimization on nvidia computers of course*. 
## Please enjoy this modpack. And if you have any issues, please DM me on discord *m0neygreen_*
